name: io.github.vncent786/bounty-api
description: Singapore property & financial data APIs for AI agents. 27 MCP tools. x402 micropayments.

environmentVariables.description: Optional. EVM private key to enable auto-pay for paid endpoints via x402. Without it, only the 8 free endpoints are callable; paid endpoints return a 402 payment challenge. Never required to use the free tier.
environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY
